answer: The Amazon River is approximately 6,400 kilometers long, according to most scientific estimates, making it the second longest river in the world after the Nile. Some reports suggest it may extend up to 7,062 kilometers. This length is widely recognized and cited by various sources.

results.title: Amazon River - Wikipedia
results.snippet: It has a recognized length of 6,400 kilometers (4,000 mi), but according to some reports, its length varies from 6,575–7,062 kilometers (4,086–4,388 mi).

results.title: Amazon River Length and Features - Facebook
results.snippet: The Amazon River is approximately: 6,400 kilometers (3,977 miles) and is the longest river in America!!! 2y. 1.

results.title: Spanning over 6400 km, the Amazon River is the world's ... - Instagram
results.snippet: Spanning over 6400 km, the Amazon River is the world's largest river in terms of sheer volume of water and the second longest river after the Nile.
